docString:
`dsimp% [‚Ä¶] t` runs `dsimp [‚Ä¶]` on term `t`.
If `t` is a proof, then it runs `dsimp [‚Ä¶]` on the type of `t` instead.

For instance, instead of
```
have foo := ...
dsimp at foo
rw [foo]
```
one can write `rw [dsimp% foo]`.

ref.pp:
/-- `dsimp% [‚Ä¶] t` runs `dsimp [‚Ä¶]` on term `t`.
If `t` is a proof, then it runs `dsimp [‚Ä¶]` on the type of `t` instead.

For instance, instead of
```
have foo := ...
dsimp at foo
rw [foo]
```
one can write `rw [dsimp% foo]`.
-/
@[term_parser 1000]
public meta def dsimpPercent : Lean.ParserDescr‚úĚ :=
  ParserDescr.node‚úĚ `Mathlib.Tactic.dsimpPercent 1022
    (ParserDescr.binary‚úĚ `andthen
      (ParserDescr.binary‚úĚ `andthen
        (ParserDescr.binary‚úĚ `andthen
          (ParserDescr.binary‚úĚ `andthen
            (ParserDescr.binary‚úĚ `andthen
              (ParserDescr.binary‚úĚ `andthen (ParserDescr.symbol‚úĚ "dsimp%") Lean.Parser.Tactic.optConfig)
              (ParserDescr.unary‚úĚ `optional Lean.Parser.Tactic.discharger))
            (ParserDescr.unary‚úĚ `optional ((with_annotate_term"&" @ParserDescr.nonReservedSymbol‚úĚ) " only" false‚úĚ)))
          (ParserDescr.unary‚úĚ `optional
            (ParserDescr.binary‚úĚ `andthen
              (ParserDescr.binary‚úĚ `andthen (ParserDescr.symbol‚úĚ " [")
                (ParserDescr.unary‚úĚ `withoutPosition
                  ((with_annotate_term"sepBy(" @ParserDescr.sepBy‚úĚ)
                    (ParserDescr.binary‚úĚ `orelse Lean.Parser.Tactic.simpErase Lean.Parser.Tactic.simpLemma) ","
                    (ParserDescr.symbol‚úĚ ", ") Bool.true‚úĚ)))
              (ParserDescr.symbol‚úĚ "]"))))
        (ParserDescr.const‚úĚ `ppSpace))
      (ParserDescr.cat‚úĚ `term 0))

                    (ParserDescr.symbol‚úĚ ", ") Bool.true‚úĚ)))

ref.pp:
@[term_elab dsimpPercent, inherit_doc dsimpPercent]
def dsimpPercentElaborator : TermElab := fun stx expectedType => do
  let fresh ‚Üź mkFreshExprMVar default
  let go : TacticM Expr := do
    let e ‚Üź Term.elabTerm stx[5] expectedType
    let { ctx, simprocs, .. } ‚Üź mkSimpContext stx (eraseLocal := false) (kind := .dsimp)
    let dsimp (e : Expr) : MetaM Expr := do
      -- Ensure that only instantiating metavariables isn't counted as progress.
      
      let e ‚Üź instantiateMVars e
      let (dsimpResult, _) ‚Üź Meta.dsimp e ctx simprocs
      if dsimpResult == e then 
        throwError"`dsimp%` made no progress"
      return dsimpResult
    if ‚Üź isProof e then 
      mkExpectedTypeHint e (‚Üź dsimp (‚Üź inferType e))
    else
      dsimp e
  go { elaborator := .anonymous } |>.run' { goals := [fresh.mvarId!] }

value.pp:

  go { elaborator := .anonymous } |>.run' { goals := [fresh.mvarId!] }
